commands.payload:
mddocs 0.6.39+f2223e2393
Copyright (c) 2018-2022, Andreas Gruenwald

  apireference       Generate API reference documentation for a .NET assembly.

  commandlinehelp    Generate command line help for .NET console application
                     implemented using the 'CommandLineParser' package

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

result.stdout:
mddocs 0.6.39+f2223e2393
Copyright (c) 2018-2022, Andreas Gruenwald

  -a, --assemblies               Path of the assemblies to generate
                                 documentation for (at least one assembly must
                                 be specified).

  -v, --verbose                  Show more detailed log output.

  -c, --configurationFilePath    The path of the configuration file to use. If
                                 no configuration file is specified, default
                                 settings are used.

  -o, --outdir                   Path of the directory to write the
                                 documentation to. If the output directory
                                 already exists, all files in the output
                                 directory will be deleted.

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

staticCommands.name: apireference
staticCommands.description: Generate API reference documentation for a .NET assembly.

options.description: Path of the assemblies to generate documentation for (at least one assembly must be specified).
The path of the configuration file to use. If no configuration file is specified, default settings are used.
Path of the directory to write the documentation to. If the output directory already exists, all files in the output directory will be deleted.

staticCommands.name: commandlinehelp
staticCommands.description: Generate command line help for .NET console application implemented using the 'CommandLineParser' package

options.description: Path of the command line application assembly to generate documentation for.
The path of the configuration file to use. If no configuration file is specified, default settings are used.
Path of the directory to write the documentation to. If the output directory already exists, all files in the output directory will be deleted.
